hero.question: Will Arizona win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: Arizona at 20.3% is pricing them as a fringe Final Four contender when their talent and trajectory suggest they're closer to a perennial Elite Eight threat in a wide-open bracket. The +2.2 point move looks like smart money trickling in ahead of March after watching them clean up the Pac-12, and that volume ($878K) says sharps are actually engaged here rather than just retail chasing chalk.

daily_take.headline: Arizona's tournament odds just spiked. Here's why the market is overcorrecting.
daily_take.deck: Arizona jumped 2.2 points overnight to 20.3%, likely riding momentum from a recent win or roster news. But 20% for a perennial power with tournament experience in a wide-open 2026 field feels cautious. The sharp move signals fresh money chasing recent performance rather than structural advantage. Fade the trend: Arizona has the infrastructure to repeat, and this number rewards patient bettors willing to sit on a medium-term hold.
